prerequisites: New customer has been created
steps: Click ESM Opportunity and fill in all necessary fields in forms
Fill in all mandatory fields for Scoping and mark as complete
expectedResults: Opportunity created
Opportunity stage moved to Quoting

prerequisites: Opportunity has been created and in Quoting stage
Quote has been created and in Draft-Sales substatus
No product is added to the Quote
Scenarios are prepared for each IPHONE product
User has logged into Salesforce as Sales
IPH-NEWFIX-002.testData:
Expected product to test 
- DIOD
- SIP Trunk Fixed Line
- SIP Trunking
steps: Click Configure Enterprise Quote
Click Add Product
Navigate to prduct category, locate, and click Communication and Collaboration
Select any of the sub-category of Voice Services, Unified Communication, or Voice API
Add the product
Click Add to Configuration Cart
Configure product based on the prepared scenario
Click Add Product
expectedResults: Enterprise Quote Configuration page is displayed.
Add Product dialog/catalog is displayed.
Sub-category under Communication and Collaboration should show up
Iphone product category is opened and the list of Iphone products is displayed.
Selected Iphone product is added to the catalog selection.
Selected product appears in the Configuration Cart.
Product attributes are configured according to the prepared scenario without validation errors.
Product is successfully added to the Quote and visible as a Quote Line Item under the Quote with the correct configuration, price, and cost.

prerequisites: Opportunity has been created and in Quoting stage
Quote has been created and in Draft-Sales substatus
Iphone product is added to the Quote
Scenarios are prepared for each Iphone product
No available Number test data in the TNM
User has logged into Salesforce as Sales
steps: Click Configure Enterprise Quote
Click Number Management
Select the Iphone product
Click Reserve Number
Input number pattern
Click Reserve Numbers
expectedResults: Enterprise Quote Configuration page is displayed.
Number Reservation wizard is launched.
Iphone product accepted by the form
Query number form shows up
Prefix inputted in the query form
No available fixed number is returned and the system displays an appropriate 'no number available' message; user is not allowed to proceed to reservation.

prerequisites: Opportunity has been created and in Quoting stage
Quote has been created and in Draft-Sales substatus
Iphone product is added to the Quote
Scenarios are prepared for each Iphone product
Prefix Number test data are prepared in the TNM
User has logged into Salesforce as Sales
IPH-NEWFIX-004.testData: Available fixed number for Iphone in TNM
steps: Click Configure Enterprise Quote
Click Number Management
Select the Iphone product
Click Reserve Number
Input number pattern
Click Reserve Numbers
Click Next
expectedResults: Enterprise Quote Configuration page is displayed.
Number Reservation wizard is launched.
Iphone product accepted by the form
Query number form shows up
Prefix inputted in the query form
List of available fixed numbers matching the prefix is returned and displayed
Numbers are reserved

prerequisites: Quote is in Draft stage
Iphone product is added to the Quote
Subscriber is created
Number is reserved
User has logged into Salesforce as Sales
steps: From the Quote Record Detail page, click Negotiation in the ribbon stage
Click Mark This Stage as Current Stage
expectedResults: Negotiation stage is highlighted in the stage ribbon.
Quote stage is updated to Negotiation and the stage ribbon reflects Negotiation as the current stage; Quote remains editable for negotiation activities.

prerequisites: Quote is in Negotiation stage
User has logged into Salesforce as Sales
steps: Click Generate Quote Document
Select IOH Quote Document as the template and click Next
Click Download PDF
Verify PDF and click the Download icon
Click Mark Quote Status as Complete
expectedResults: Document Generation wizard is launched.
IOH Quote Document template is selected and a preview is generated.
PDF preview is displayed.
Generated PDF reflects the Quote details (products, configuration, price) accurately and is downloaded successfully to the local machine.
Quote status is updated to indicate the document has been completed/generated and is stored under the Quote's related files.

prerequisites: User has logged into Salesforce as Sales profile
Initial Quote is in Negotiation Stage
Products are configured with the appropriate price and cost in the Quote
steps: Click the Close Stage button
Click Close Status field and select Closed as the type
Click Document Type field and select Quote Acceptence Evidence
Click Upload Files
Select file from local storage
Click Upload
Navigate to Related tab and go to Links section
Verify the document by checking through the link
expectedResults: Close Stage dialog is displayed.
Closed status is selected.
Quote Acceptance Evidence is selected as Document Type.
File picker is opened.
File is selected from local storage.
File is uploaded successfully and Quote is closed as Won.
Related tab and Links section are displayed.

Uploaded Quote Acceptance Evidence is accessible via the link and shows the correct document; the parent Opportunity automatically progresses to the Contracting stage and a Contract is created/associated.

prerequisites: User has logged into Salesforce as Sales
Contract is Created with associated Quote
Products are added to the Quote
steps: From the Contract Record Detail page, navigate to the Contract Documents section and click Generate
Click Select a Document Template dropdown
Select IOH FAB Document (version 1) [DocX]
Verify the document preview and click Download PDF under the Download Document section
Click Check In
expectedResults: Document Generation wizard is launched from the Contract.
Template dropdown is displayed with the available templates.
IOH FAB Document (version 1) [DocX] is selected.
FAB document preview shows correct customer, Quote, and product information; PDF is downloaded successfully.
Generated FAB is checked in and stored under the Contract's documents/files; Contract Document record is created.

prerequisites: User has logged into Salesforce as Sales
FAB is generated
Contract is in Draft stage
steps: From Contract Record Detail page, click the stage button in the ribbon
Select Negotiation
Click Mark This Stage as Current Stage
expectedResults: Contract stage transitions from Draft to Negotiation.
Negotiation stage is selected.
The stage ribbon on the Contract Record Detail page reflects Negotiation as the current stage and the Contract remains editable for negotiation activities.

IPH-NEWFIX-010.description: Upload related document including signed FAB
prerequisites: User has logged into Salesforce as Sales
Opportunity is successfully updated to Contracting stage
Contract is in Negotiation stage
steps: Within the Contract Record Detail page, navigate to the action button section in the top-right corner of the page and click Upload Document
Click the Select Document Type dropdown
Select FAB as the document type
Click Upload Files
Select the signed FAB file from the local machine
Click Upload
Navigate to the Related tab and Links section
Click the newest Link and verify the document uploaded
Navigate to Opportunity record detail page and Upload all required document which can be uploaded in the Opportunity
Navigate to Account record detail page and Upload all required document which can be uploaded in the Opportunity
expectedResults: Upload Document dialog is displayed.
Document Type dropdown is displayed.
FAB is selected as the document type.
File picker is opened.
Signed FAB file is selected.
File is uploaded successfully and confirmation is displayed.
Related tab and Links section are displayed.
The newest Link opens and shows the signed FAB document correctly.
All required Opportunity-level documents are uploaded successfully and visible under the Opportunity's Files/Links.
All required Account-level documents are uploaded successfully and visible under the Account's Files/Links.

IPH-NEWFIX-011.description: Move contract to Customer Assessment stage
prerequisites: User has logged into Salesforce as Sales
Opportunity is successfully updated to Contracting stage
Required documents are uploaded in the Opportunity
FAB is uploaded
steps: Within the Contract Record Detail page, click the stage button and click Negotiation
Refresh the browser
expectedResults: Stage update is triggered.
After refresh, the Contract stage is updated to Customer Assessment and the stage ribbon reflects Customer Assessment as the current stage; the Contract is routed to the RCA queue for verification.

prerequisites: User has logged into Salesforce as RCA profile
Opportunity is successfully updated to Contracting stage
steps: Navigate to Related tab
Navigate to Links section
Click the FAB Signed link
Verify FAB
Mark RCA Validation field as true
expectedResults: Related tab is displayed.
Links section is displayed and includes the FAB Signed link.
Signed FAB document opens.
FAB content matches the Quote/Contract details and customer signature is visible.
RCA Validation field is updated to true and saved on the Contract.

prerequisites: Login to Salesforce org with RCA User Profile
Total Quote Cost is <= 10K USD
steps: Click Submit for Approval
Login as VP RCA
Navigate to approval notification and click it
Click Approve
Navigate to Contract related tab
Navigate to Approval History section
Verify Approval status
expectedResults: Contract is submitted into the approval process and routed to the VP RCA approver.
Login as VP RCA is successful.
Approval notification opens the pending approval record.
Approval is recorded successfully.
Related tab is displayed.
Approval History section is displayed.
Approval History shows the request as Approved by the VP RCA, with timestamp and approver, and the Contract proceeds to the next stage.

prerequisites: Login to Salesforce org with RCA User Profile
Opportunity is successfully updated to Contracting stage
steps: Click Enterprise Quote
Select some products
Click Enrich Quote
Select an Account for association
Select some products not linked to an account
Select a different Account for association
Confirm association
expectedResults: Enterprise Quote page is displayed.
Products are selected.
Enrich Quote action is triggered.
Selected Account is associated to the chosen products.
Remaining unlinked products are selected.
The second Account is associated to the second set of products.
Associations are confirmed and saved; Contract stage is updated to Signed and the stage ribbon reflects Signed as the current stage.

prerequisites: User has logged into Salesforce as BRC User profile
steps: Navigate to Related tab
Navigate to Links section
Click the FAB Signed link
Verify FAB
expectedResults: Related tab is displayed.
Links section is displayed and includes the FAB Signed link.
Signed FAB document opens.
FAB content (customer, products, configuration, price) matches the associated Quote; verification can be marked as completed by BRC.

IPH-NEWFIX-016.description: Link IPHONE product to existing BA
prerequisites: User has logged into Salesforce as BRC profile
Contract is in Signed stage
Quote Line Item is available
Multiple Billing Account (BA) is available
steps: Click Enterprise Quote
Select some products
Click Enrich Quote
Select an Account for association
Select some products not linked to an account
Select a different Account for association
Confirm association
expectedResults: Enterprise Quote page is displayed.
Iphone products/Quote Line Items are selected.
Enrich Quote action is triggered.
The first existing Billing Account is associated to the selected products.
Remaining unlinked products are selected.
A different existing Billing Account is associated to the second set of products.
Associations are saved successfully; each affected Quote Line Item now references the chosen Billing Account on the Quote.

prerequisites: User has logged into Salesforce as BRC profile
Opportunity is successfully updated to Contracting stage
steps: Navigate to the associated Opportunity by clicking the Opportunity in the Detail tab within the Order Record Detail page

expectedResults: Associated Opportunity Record Detail page is displayed.
Eligibility check is triggered against the customer.
Eligibility Status field is populated (e.g., Eligible) and Eligibility Status Dt. field is updated with the current date/time.

prerequisites: User has logged into Salesforce as BRC profile

steps: From Contract Record Detail page, click Activate
expectedResults: Contract status is updated to Activated; the stage ribbon reflects Activated as the current stage and the Contract becomes ready for Order generation.

prerequisites: 1. User has logged into Salesforce as BRC profile
2. Order has been generated successfully and is in Draft stage
3. Sub-orders have been generated successfully and is in Draft stage
steps: From within Contract Record Detail page, click Create Order

expectedResults: Master Order is created from the Contract in Draft stage.

Order related list shows the Master Order and the expected number of sub-orders (one per Account/Billing Account grouping) all in Draft stage, correctly linked to the parent Master Order.

prerequisites: User has logged into Salesforce as BRC profile
Order has been generated successfully and is in Draft stage
Sub-orders have been generated successfully and is in Draft stage
steps: From within, Master Order Record Detail page, click Submit Order

expectedResults: Master Order and its sub-orders are submitted; status moves from Draft to In Progress.
Each sub-order opens successfully.
Orchestration Plan related list is displayed for each sub-order.
Orchestration Plan record opens.
Orchestration Plan contains the expected Orchestration Items for the Iphone product and they are in their initial executable state, with the appropriate sequence.

expectedResults: Work plan should be available
"Upload Signed BAST" should be available as step
Option to change status as Complete or Not Applicable should be available
Error message should show up informing user to upload Signed BAST
Work step status should be changed to Complete and proceed to next step

prerequisites: 1,1 User has logged into Salesforce as Service Delivery (SD)
Billing Order Activation Completed
Upload Signed BAST Work Plan is completed
Work Order is in 'Service Acceptance' status
steps: Check work plan under Testing work order
Check if "Upload Installation Report" available as step
Check if "Upload Installation Report" have button to chance status as Complete or Not Applicable
Choose status Complete without uploading Installation Report

expectedResults: Work plan should be available

IPH-NEWFIX-053.description: Update RFS Date and Bill Date for IPHONE
prerequisites: 1,1 User has logged into Salesforce as Service Delivery (SD)
Billing Order Activation Completed
Upload Signed BAST Work Plan is completed
Work Order is in 'Service Acceptance' status
steps: From Work Order Record Detail page, click the pen icon beside one of the fields
Update the 'Actual RFS Date' & 'Start Billing Date' fields
Click Save
From Work Order Related List, under Work Plan, click Complete for 'Update Actual RFS Date & Start Billing Date' Work Plan
expectedResults: Field becomes editable.
Actual RFS Date and Start Billing Date fields are populated with valid values.
Field values are saved successfully on the Work Order.
Update Actual RFS Date & Start Billing Date Work Plan is marked Complete and order is completed

prerequisites: User has logged into Salesforce as Service Delivery (SD) profile
Sub-orders have been submitted and is in Service Activated stage
Work Order Testing is Completed
steps: From the relevant Orchestration Plan Record Detail page, navigate to Orchestration Plan section
Locate the Bill on Email Orchestration Items
Verify both items show Completed status
expectedResults: Orchestration Plan section is displayed.
Bill on Email Orchestration Item is in Completed status; customer's email is registered for Bill on Email delivery in NRM; orchestration proceeds to next step.

prerequisites: User has logged into Salesforce as Service Delivery (SD) profile
Sub-orders have been submitted and is in Service Activated stage
Work Order Testing is Completed
steps: From the relevant Orchestration Plan Record Detail page, navigate to Orchestration Plan section
Locate the Bill on Email Orchestration Items
Verify Bill on Email shows Failed status
expectedResults: Orchestration Plan section is displayed.
Bill on Email Orchestration Item is in Failed status; orchestration is paused at this step pending retry.

prerequisites: User has logged into Salesforce as Service Delivery (SD) profile
Sub-orders have been submitted and is in Service Activated stage
Work Order Testing is Completed
Bill on Email Orchestration Item is failed
steps: From the relevant Orchestration Plan Record Detail page, navigate to Orchestration Plan section
Locate the Bill on Email Orchestration Items
Click the three dot icon in the Bill on Email Orchestration Item and click Retry Item
Verify both items now show Completed status
expectedResults: Orchestration Plan section is displayed.
Bill on Email Orchestration Item is in Failed status.
Retry action is triggered.
Bill on Email Orchestration Item is re-executed and updated to Completed; orchestration proceeds to next step.

prerequisites: User has logged into Salesforce as Service Delivery (SD) profile
Sub-orders have been submitted and is in Billing Activated stage
Bill on Email Orchestration Item is Completed
steps: From the relevant Orchestration Plan Record Detail page, navigate to Orchestration Plan section
Locate the Assetize Order Orchestration Items
expectedResults: Orchestration Plan section is displayed.
Assetize Order Orchestration Item is in Completed status; corresponding Assets are created against the Account for each IPHONE Order Line Item.

prerequisites: User has logged into Salesforce as Service Delivery (SD) profile
Sub-orders have been submitted and is in Closed stage
Assetized Order Orchestration Item is Completed
steps: From the relevant Orchestration Plan Record Detail page, navigate to Orchestration Plan section
Locate the End Order (Asset Created) Orchestration Items
expectedResults: Orchestration Plan section is displayed.

End Order (Asset Created) Orchestration Item is in Completed status; the sub-order is moved to Closed/Activated, the Orchestration Plan is fully completed, and the Master Order is updated accordingly once all sub-orders are completed.

prerequisites: User has logged into Salesforce as Service Delivery (SD) profile
Sub-orders have been submitted and is in Closed stage
End Order (Asset Created) Orchestration Item is Completed
steps: From the relevant Opportunity Record Detail page, locate the Stages Ribbon
Verify Opportunity Stage Ribbon and Status field
expectedResults: Opportunity Stages Ribbon is displayed.
Opportunity stage is updated to Closed Won and the Status field reflects that the first bill payment has been received; the end-to-end Opportunity to Cash flow is completed.
